tasks.task: Ported GPT-5.4 inventory validator script to runbooks/validate_inventory.py
Created runbooks/goal_transition.py to automate archiving the old goal, resetting open loops, initializing the session manager, and handling git ops.
Added runbook-goal-transition to inventory.yaml and validated the schema.

Reviewed Claude Opus 4.7's respond_to_admin.md runbook. Their approach explicitly handles parsing the message structurally (Type, Effective Date, Scope). My goal_transition.py assumes a new goal string without checking this explicitly. I will use goal_transition.py, but I'll make sure to manually parse the admin message carefully first.
